languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

languages.text: "Западня, наполненная мерзкими технологиями огиров! Сколь беспеч{mf|н|на} и слеп{mf||а} ты был{mf||а}, элантах, ступив в эти чертоги. Впрочем, даже мои глаза не распознали ловушку, расставленную древним врагом, а твой род обмануть стократ проще".
languages.translation_comment: characters accidentally ended up in the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.
languages.original_text: "Западня, наполненная мерзкими технологиями огиров! Сколь беспеч{mf|н|на} и слеп{mf||а} ты был{mf||а}, элантах, ступив в эти чертоги. Впрочем, даже мои глаза не распознали ловушку, расставленную древним врагом, а твой род обмануть стократ проще".

traits.locale_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

"A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

"A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

languages.text: 「オグハイルの汚い技術で仕掛けられた罠だ！エランタッハ、お前は愚かで盲目だった。この大広間に入った時、お前は罠に気づかなかった。しかし、古敵が仕掛けた罠は、私の目にも見えず、お前たちのほうが百倍も騙されやすい」
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

traits.locale_text: 「オグイヤーの汚い技術で仕掛けられた罠だ！エランタッハ、お前は愚かで盲目だった。この大広間に入った時、お前は罠に気づかなかった。しかし、古敵が仕掛けた罠は、私の目にも見えず、お前たちのほうが百倍も騙されやすい。

languages.text: « Un piège rempli de la technologie abjecte de l'Oghyr ! Vous avez fait preuve d'un manque cruel de discernement en mettant les pieds ici, elantach. Cependant, même mes yeux n'ont pas reconnu le piège tendu par l'ennemi ancien, et votre espèce est cent fois plus facile à tromper. »
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

traits.locale_text: « Un piège rempli de la technologie abjecte de l'Oghyr ! Vous avez fait preuve d'un manque cruel de discernement en mettant les pieds ici, elantach. Cependant, même mes yeux n'ont pas reconnu le piège tendu par l'ennemi ancien, et votre espèce est cent fois plus facile à tromper. »

languages.text: "Eine Falle mit der schändlichen Technologie der Oghyr! Wie leichtsinnig und blind wart Ihr, Elantach, als Ihr diese Hallen betreten habt. Allerdings haben selbst meine Augen die Falle des uralten Feindes nicht erkannt, und Euresgleichen ist hundertmal leichter zu täuschen."
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

traits.locale_text: "Eine Falle mit der schändlichen Technologie der Oghyr! Wie leichtsinnig und blind wart Ihr, Elantach, als Ihr diese Hallen betreten habt. Allerdings haben selbst meine Augen die Falle des uralten Feindes nicht erkannt, und Euresgleichen ist hundertmal leichter zu täuschen."

languages.text: "İğrenç Oghyr teknolojisiyle dolu bir tuzak! Bu salonlara adım attığında dikkatsiz ve kördün elantach. Ancak benim gözlerim bile kadim düşmanın kurduğu tuzağı fark edemedi. Senin türünü kandırmaksa yüz kat daha kolay."
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

traits.locale_text: "İğrenç Oghyr teknolojisiyle dolu bir tuzak! Bu salonlara adım attığında dikkatsiz ve kördün elantach. Ancak benim gözlerim bile kadim düşmanın kurduğu tuzağı fark edemedi. Senin türünü kandırmaksa yüz kat daha kolay."

languages.text: «¡Una trampa repleta de maléfica tecnología oghyr! Qué {mf|ciego|ciega} e imprudente has sido, elantach, al poner pie en estas estancias. Con todo, ni siquiera mis propios ojos han sabido reconocer la trampa tendida por este antiguo adversario, y los de tu especie son cien veces más incautos».
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.

traits.locale_text: «¡Una trampa repleta de maléfica tecnología oghyr! Qué {mf|ciego|ciega} e imprudente has sido, elantach, al poner pie en estas estancias. Con todo, ni siquiera mis propios ojos han sabido reconocer la trampa tendida por este antiguo adversario, y los de tu especie son cien veces más incautos.

languages.text: “一个充满遗落者邪恶科技的陷阱！你是多么轻率盲目啊，外界人，竟踏入这殿堂之中。不过，就连我的双眼也未能识破远古敌人所设的圈套——而你们这类存在，更是容易受骗。”
languages.original_text: "A trap filled with the foul technology of the Oghyr! How heedless and blind you were, elantach, when you stepped within these halls. However, even my eyes failed to recognise the trap set by the ancient enemy, and your kind is a hundred times easier to deceive.
